chunks.text: ![Regulatory Affairs Professionals Society Logo](https://www.raps.org/static/101e2bda-0c63-416f-9c947a6af340a61e/2026RAPS-50-H-Full-Color.webp) ![BK-RegIntelReimagined-PDT- square - New.JPG](https://www.raps.org/static/1d3216fe-6061-4520-a65e86f8162f8951/megamenuimage_a1148e265142707eacf0ce7677a0ab20_4a7c7e45a350/BK-RegIntelReimagined-PDT-square-NewJPG.jpg) ### [Regulatory Intelligence Reimagined](https://www.raps.org/product/regulatory-intelligence-reimagined.html) A cutting-edge reference for mastering regulatory intelligence in the age of AI. This 28-chapter guide combines expert insights with real-world stories and practical frameworks. [Learn More](https://www.raps.org/product/regulatory-intelligence-reimagined.html) ![FRA-fullcolor 380 x 277.png](https://www.raps.org/static/382ae176-d5b5-4b70-a849bb89e6c54e14/megamenuimage_a1148e265142707eacf0ce7677a0ab20_4a7c7e45a350/FRA-fullcolor-380-x-277.png) ### [Introducing the FRA credential](https://www.raps.org/certify-advance/credentials/fra.html) Our new assessment-based certificate is designed for early-career regulatory professionals. [Learn More](https://www.raps.org/certify-advance/credentials/fra.html) ![2026-JRA-Q1-PDT-300x250.jpg](https://www.raps.org/static/a69efca4-7ef9-4727-9d521b06c586ba26/megamenuimage_a1148e265142707eacf0ce7677a0ab20_4a7c7e45a350/2026-JRA-Q1-PDT-300x250.jpg) ### [Journal of Regulatory Affairs](https://www.raps.org/news-insights/journal.html) A bimonthly, peer-reviewed publication providing in-depth, evidence-based content, exclusive to RAPS members. [Check it out](https://www.raps.org/news-insights/journal.html) ![CE_H_Collab-Comm_380x300.jpg](https://www.raps.org/static/1e7b8497-6c20-4fa8-8227b8a9a804a2d8/megamenuimage_a1148e265142707eacf0ce7677a0ab20_4a7c7e45a350/CEHCollab-Comm380x300.jpg) ### [Collaborative Communities](https://connect.raps.org/communities/collaborative-communities) Join one of the many groups where you can pursue your regulatory passions with people who share your interests. [Get Involved](https://connect.raps.org/communities/collaborative-communities) ![CR_H_Career-Resources_380x300.jpg](https://www.raps.org/static/0b132115-b3da-418b-bf47e093b3e44e61/megamenuimage_a1148e265142707eacf0ce7677a0ab20_4a7c7e45a350/CRHCareer-Resources380x300.jpg) ### [Help with your career transition](https://www.raps.org/career-and-resources.html) Navigating the regulatory job market? These resources can help. [Learn More](https://www.raps.org/career-and-resources.html) ![rf-fullcolor.png](https://www.raps.org/static/326100aa-a8a6-41c8-88b0edfd6bcc8eed/71105bac-1b8d-495b-8eef58dd76d1920e/rapsresourcebannerlogo_9b0b3184dc59d50e4e10531d04b5ac6c_4a7c7e45a350/rf-fullcolor.png) ![rf-fullcolor.png](https://www.raps.org/static/326100aa-a8a6-41c8-88b0edfd6bcc8eed/71105bac-1b8d-495b-8eef58dd76d1920e/rapsresourcebannerlogo_9b0b3184dc59d50e4e10531d04b5ac6c_4a7c7e45a350/rf-fullcolor.png) # This Week at FDA: CDRH annual report, partial shutdown update, and more #### Related topics ![rf-fullcolor.png](https://www.raps.org/static/326100aa-a8a6-41c8-88b0edfd6bcc8eed/71105bac-1b8d-495b-8eef58dd76d1920e/300x76_highestperformance__4a7c7e45a350/rf-fullcolor.png) [Subscribe](https://www.raps.org/my-raps/preferences.html) Welcome member! [Learn more about your benefits](https://www.raps.org/connect-engage/membership/about-my-membership.html) ### Quick Links Share on social ### Recommended content ![EC_HQ6_260421_ALF.png](https://www.raps.org/static/886bba1d-28e2-46ab-af04aba9e7dfda34/resourcegridlistingimagedefault_4d12532919c64e60a22baf03232bbf94_4a7c7e45a350/ECHQ6260421ALF.png) #### [EU publishes roadmap to reduce reliance on animal testing](https://www.raps.org/resource/eu-publishes-roadmap-to-reduce-reliance-on-animal-testing.html) The European Commission has adopted a roadmap to phase out the use of animals in chemical safety assessments, including for pharmaceuticals. ![Gene_Therapy_260602_iStock.jpg](https://www.raps.org/static/69c7ec4d-5160-4967-b69d887cb59d323a/resourcegridlistingimagedefault_4d12532919c64e60a22baf03232bbf94_4a7c7e45a350/GeneTherapy260602iStock.jpg) #### [FDA aims to speed gene therapy development with prior scientific knowledge guidance](https://www.raps.org/resource/fda-aims-to-speed-gene-therapy-development-with-prior-scientific-knowledge-guidance.html) The US Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has proposed guidance on the types of scientifically valid prior knowledge sponsors should consider when developing certain gene therapies (GT). The agency said the recommendations in the guidance are intended to improve review efficiency and help accelerate product development. ![Europe_Map_260528_iStock.jpg](https://www.raps.org/static/263d1da8-3c54-4d8a-bac72e05452e2f52/resourcegridlistingimagedefault_4d12532919c64e60a22baf03232bbf94_4a7c7e45a350/EuropeMap260528iStock.jpg) #### [EU Commission drafts guidelines on classifying high-risk systems under the AI Act](https://www.raps.org/resource/eu-commission-drafts-guidelines-on-classifying-high-risk-systems-under-the-ai-act.html) Draft guidelines from the European Commission aim to assist companies in determining whether their products, including medical devices that incorporate artificial intelligence (AI) components, are classified as high-risk under the EU's Artificial Intelligence Act.
